    What We Offer

    Complete Dental Services

    From routine prevention to complex restorations — every service delivered with expertise and genuine care.

    🦷

    General Dentistry

    From $80

    Comprehensive checkups, cleanings, and preventive care to keep your teeth healthy for life.

    • Annual checkups
    • Teeth cleanings
    • Cavity fillings
    • Gum disease treatment
    Book This Service
    ✨

    Teeth Whitening

    From $250

    Professional in-office whitening treatments that brighten your smile by up to 8 shades in just one visit.

    • In-office treatment
    • Take-home kits
    • Long-lasting results
    • Safe & pain-free
    Book This Service
    🔬

    Orthodontics

    From $1,800

    Modern braces and clear aligners to straighten your teeth comfortably and discreetly.

    • Traditional braces
    • Clear aligners
    • Retainers
    • Monthly monitoring
    Book This Service
    🏥

    Dental Implants

    From $1,200

    Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacement solutions that restore your smile and confidence.

    • Single implants
    • Implant bridges
    • Full arch solutions
    • Lifetime support
    Book This Service
    🚨

    Emergency Care

    From $120

    Same-day emergency appointments for urgent dental issues. We're here when you need us most.

    • Same-day appointments
    • Tooth pain relief
    • Broken tooth repair
    • Lost filling/crown
    Book This Service
    👶

    Pediatric Dentistry

    From $60

    Gentle, fun dental care designed specifically for children, making every visit a positive experience.

    • First visit prep
    • Sealants
    • Fluoride treatment
    • Kid-friendly environment
    Book This Service
    🌟

    Cosmetic Dentistry

    From $400

    Transform your smile with veneers, bonding, and complete smile makeovers tailored to you.

    • Porcelain veneers
    • Dental bonding
    • Smile makeovers
    • Gum contouring
    Book This Service
    🔧

    Restorative Dentistry

    From $500

    Repair damaged teeth and restore full function with crowns, bridges, and dentures.

    • Dental crowns
    • Bridges
    • Dentures
    • Root canals
    Book This Service
    How It Works

    Your Care Journey

    01

    Book Online

    Choose your service, dentist, and preferred time in minutes.

    02

    Consultation

    Meet your dentist for a thorough exam and personalized treatment plan.

    03

    Treatment

    Receive world-class care in our comfortable, modern clinic.

    04

    Follow-Up

    We check in to ensure you're healing well and smiling brighter.

    Ready to Get Started?

    Book your appointment today. Our friendly team will guide you to the right service for your needs.

    Book Appointment
    Tooth World Dental Clinic

    Modern dental care with a gentle touch. Your smile is our passion.
